details.test: Task 1: Favorite 3 animal-themed picture book illustrations (ages 3-5, since 2022)
Task 2: Submit commission inquiry for 24-page picture book under $500
Task 3: Choose package with >=20 illustrations under $1500 and request it
Task 4: Bookmark 2 self-publishing blog posts from 2023
Task 5: Create "Forest Book Moodboard" collection and add pastel whimsical illustrations
Task 6: Add 2 signed middle-grade books under $25 each to cart
Task 7: Register new reader account with illustration and writing preferences
Task 8: Add fantasy first-person middle-grade story over 2000 words to reading list
Task 9: Schedule 30-minute portfolio consultation on a Wednesday between 2-5 PM
